name: Zumiez Inc
summary: Zumiez Inc. is a specialty retailer of apparel, footwear, accessories, and hardgoods targeting young men and women interested in action sports, streetwear, and unique lifestyles. Operating under Zumiez, Blue Tomato, and Fast Times brands, the company runs 719 stores across the U.S., Canada, Europe, and Australia, complemented by ecommerce platforms. Products include skateboards, snowboards, bindings, and private label apparel.

products.name: Apparel
products.description: Branded and private label clothing for action sports and streetwear lifestyles

products.name: Footwear
products.description: Shoes and boots aligned with action sports and streetwear trends

products.name: Accessories
products.description: Fashion accessories for young men and women in lifestyle segments

products.name: Hardgoods
products.description: Skateboards, snowboards, bindings, components and other action sports equipment
